entry.name: icon
entry.label: The name of the icon to use for the compact representation.

entry.name: useCustomButtonImage
entry.label: Whether to use a custom image instead of an icon.

entry.name: customButtonImage
entry.label: The URL of the custom image to use instead of an icon.

entry.name: menuLabel
entry.label: Text label shown next to the panel icon.

entry.name: openOnActiveScreen
entry.label: Whether to open on the screen with mouse focus (true) or the screen with the panel (false).

entry.name: showDividers
entry.label: Whether to show divider lines between UI sections.

entry.name: openAnimation
entry.label: Open/close animation style (0=None, 1=Fade, 2=Scale, 3=Pop, 4=Slide Up, 5=Glide, 6=Buzz, 7=Twist, 8=Slam).

entry.name: showSessionButtons
entry.label: Legacy — migrated to powerButtonOrder / powerButtonsHidden on first run.

entry.name: powerButtonOrder
entry.label: Top-level power/session slots in display order; empty means the default order.

entry.name: powerButtonsHidden
entry.label: Power/session button ids the user has hidden (sleep, restart, shutdown, session, lock, logout, switchuser).

entry.name: powerButtonsMigrated
entry.label: Whether the legacy showSessionButtons toggle has been migrated to the per-button config.

entry.name: headerActions
entry.label: Header actions in display order as "id:placement" (placement = bar, menu, or off). Empty falls back to the built-in default; missing known ids are appended at their default placement.

entry.name: headerActionsMigrated
entry.label: Whether the legacy powerButtonOrder/powerButtonsHidden config has been folded into headerActions.

entry.name: showScrollbars
entry.label: Whether to show scrollbars in the grid and search views.

entry.name: backgroundOpacity
entry.label: Background opacity percentage (0-100).

entry.name: enableBlur
entry.label: Whether to enable background blur effect.

entry.name: dimBackground
entry.label: Whether to dim the screen behind the launcher overlay.

entry.name: verticalOffset
entry.label: Vertical position of the centered launcher as a percent of the free space (-100 = top, 0 = centered, 100 = bottom).

entry.name: showTooltips
entry.label: Show hover-tooltips on app icons (grid, recents, by-category). Other tooltips — header actions, More options, settings — are always shown; Qt/KDE has no system-wide tooltip toggle to defer to.

entry.name: hoverHighlight
entry.label: Whether to draw a soft highlight behind an app icon on mouse hover.

entry.name: showNewAppBadge
entry.label: Whether to show a green badge on newly installed apps.

entry.name: iconShadow
entry.label: Whether to draw a soft drop shadow behind app icons in the grid.

entry.name: sortFavoritesAlphabetically
entry.label: Whether to auto-sort favorites alphabetically instead of by manual order.

entry.name: hideLabelsOnFavorites
entry.label: Whether to hide app name labels on the favorites tab.

entry.name: favoritesPortedToKAstats
entry.label: Whether existing local favorites have been migrated into the KActivities-backed favorites model.

entry.name: iconMigratedFrom17
entry.label: Whether the launcher icon has been migrated for users upgrading from 1.7.x (preserves the prior default).

entry.name: checkForUpdates
entry.label: Whether to check the AppGrid website periodically for new releases. Universal-build only; ignored on distro packages where the package manager handles updates.

entry.name: shakeOnOpen
entry.label: Whether to shake all icons when the grid opens.

entry.name: searchAll
entry.label: Whether search covers all apps regardless of active category or favorites filter.

entry.name: hideGridWhenEmpty
entry.label: Compact mode: hide the app grid and category bar until the user types something.

entry.name: startWithFavorites
entry.label: Whether to show the favorites tab by default when opening the launcher.

entry.name: hoverAnimation
entry.label: Icon hover animation (0=None, 1=Shake, 2=Grow, 3=Bounce, 4=Spin, 5=Shuffle).

entry.name: showActionLabels
entry.label: Whether to show text labels on power/session buttons.

entry.name: hiddenApps
entry.label: List of hidden application storage IDs.

entry.name: favoriteApps
entry.label: List of favorite application storage IDs.

entry.name: useExtraRunners
entry.label: Whether to use additional KRunner plugins for search.

entry.name: searchUsesFrecency
entry.label: Bias search result ranking with KActivities frecency (frequency + recency) scores so apps you use a lot recently surface above equally-scored alternatives.

entry.name: searchShowsHidden
entry.label: Surface hidden applications in search results so a deliberately hidden tool stays findable by name. Off (default) → hidden apps drop out of search the same way they drop out of the grid.

entry.name: gridColumns
entry.label: Maximum number of icons per row.

entry.name: gridRows
entry.label: Maximum number of visible rows.

entry.name: overrideRadius
entry.label: Whether to override the default corner radius.

entry.name: cornerRadius
entry.label: Custom corner radius in pixels.

entry.name: useThemeBackground
entry.label: Draw the panel background using the active Plasma theme's dialog SVG instead of a flat tinted color. Theme owns the corner radius when on, so the custom radius setting is disabled.

entry.name: showRecentApps
entry.label: Whether to show recently used applications at the top of the grid.

entry.name: recentApps
entry.label: List of recently launched application storage IDs.

entry.name: iconSize
entry.label: Icon size preset (0=Small, 1=Medium, 2=Large).

entry.name: sortMode
entry.label: Sort mode (0=Alphabetical, 1=Most Used).

entry.name: launchCounts
entry.label: Launch counts per application (storageId=count format).

entry.name: knownApps
entry.label: List of known application storage IDs for new-app detection.

entry.name: showCategoryBar
entry.label: Whether to show the category filter bar.

entry.name: useSystemCategories
entry.label: Whether to use KDE menu system categories instead of the simplified built-in mapping.

entry.name: hideEmptyCategories
entry.label: Whether to hide categories with no applications from the category bar.

entry.name: terminalShell
entry.label: Shell to use for t: terminal commands (e.g. /bin/bash, /bin/zsh). Empty uses /bin/sh.
